title: Three-Plate Zine
description: A reference-dependent Risograph series: one base zine poster followed by three print-fault variations preserving the same composition.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes a three-color zine poster on physical paper; images 02-04 depend on it and preserve the layout while changing registration drift, double-feed ghosting, and black-plate overprint behavior.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Three-Plate Zine
en.description: A reference-dependent Risograph series: one base zine poster followed by three print-fault variations preserving the same composition.

zh-CN.title: 三色版 Zine
zh-CN.description: 一张基准 Risograph zine 海报，后续三张在保持构图的同时改变错版、重影和黑版拖墨。
